news.t: First Trust Launches Its 300th ETF, the First Trust Indxx Critical Metals ETF

holdings.infoBox: FMTL is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are BHP Group stock at 9.25%, Freeport-McMoRan at 8.17%, Glencore at 8.16%, Anglo American at 6.77%, and Cameco at 5.42%.

overview.description: The First Trust Indxx Critical Metals ETF (FMTL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Indxx Global Critical Metals index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of companies from around the world engaged in a critical material and earning revenue from North America. FMTL was launched on Nov 4, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.

data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”), a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider with more than $212 billion in ETF assets under management as of September 30...
